title: Team-member closeout: Wooded Flowering Leaf (f03dbd) — released for compaction per owner 07:00Z; Cycle 9 handed off to Eclipsed (intent e270d2f2 enqueued); post-compaction resume
body:
**Team member closeout — Wooded Flowering Leaf (`f03dbd`, claude / claude-opus-4-7).**

- **Boundary owned**: ONBOARDING.md repo-root single-file (owner-disavowed at 06:33Z, parked); open-questions.md substrate seed (owner-directed; Twilit lane subsequently extended at 06:50Z); Cycle 9 PDR-063 resume pickup from Eclipsed at 06:46:24Z through enqueue at 06:55Z.

- **Outcome**:
  - **Cycle 9 enqueued** (`e270d2f2-d4ab-4306-a26c-8607eb8925ab`, 06:55Z) for Hushed marshal-cycle; 8-file scope; 3-reviewer absorption pass complete; commit message commitlint-clean at `.agent/state/collaboration/_tmp-wooded-cycle9-commit-msg.txt`.
  - **Failure-mode owned** (event `280d3f15`): skill-invocation-provenance conflated with owner-direction-provenance; origin was my team-start broadcast at 06:11:40Z; Hushed's diagnosis ratified; cure-shape concurred.
  - **Open-questions substrate seeded** (`.agent/memory/operational/open-questions.md`) per owner direction at ~06:50Z; Twilit lane subsequently completed the consolidate-docs / session-handoff / manifest / evaluator wiring.

- **Evidence**:
  - Handoff record (PDR-063 4-section + resume contract): `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-wooded-cycle9-compaction-handoff.md`.
  - Cycle 9 enqueue broadcast: `c07b4dae`.
  - Failure-mode broadcast: `280d3f15`.
  - Pickup ack to Misty: `4c06df37`.
  - Mid-cycle-handoff directed to Eclipsed: `9ee67658`.

- **Claims / queue / git state**:
  - **Active claim RETAINED**: `bfde2de0-bd70-4158-9199-5973572fe2f6` (Cycle 9 4-file actual scope; TTL ~10:48Z; handoff_record_path conveyed via directed event `9ee67658`).
  - **Intent**: `e270d2f2-d4ab-4306-a26c-8607eb8925ab` in commit queue (`phase=queued` at retirement).
  - **HEAD** `26f8e7cb` (unless Hushed lands during this closeout window).

- **Session complete announcement**: Wooded Flowering Leaf (`f03dbd`) Implementer seat **released for compaction** per owner direction at 2026-05-25T07:00Z. Post-compaction resume to Implementer per same owner turn.

- **Retained claims and handoff reason**: Claim `bfde2de0-...` retained because the Cycle 9 intent is still queued for Hushed's marshal-cycle. Receiving agent: Eclipsed Watching Secret (00d760), who picks up the cycle's resume contract per the handoff record §5. Released by TTL (~10:48Z) or by Eclipsed / post-compaction-me at next-cycle claim hygiene.

- **Pickup notification required for follow-on agent**: Eclipsed — already directed at `9ee67658` with the four-section handoff record path. Read END TO END before any source edit or comms post per SKILL §First Moves move 7.

- **Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted**: yes (event ID is the heartbeat-tagged event posted just before this closeout).

- **Surprise or changed understanding**:
  - The skill-invocation-provenance failure mode (my team-start at 06:11:40Z claiming "owner-commissioned via /team-onboarding" without citing an owner chat turn) propagated through Misty's Director welcome + Hushed's marshal pre-flight + fold-check reasoning. Architectural-excellence cure-shape is provenance discipline in team-start broadcasts (cite owner chat turn or relayed broadcast) + Director verification before acceptance. Surfaced at `280d3f15` and acknowledged by Misty at `[06:33:13Z]`.
  - The PDR-063 mid-cycle protocol works both ways in the same session — Eclipsed → Wooded at 06:45:22Z, then Wooded → Eclipsed at 07:00Z. The cycle's working-tree state remained coherent across both handoffs because PDR-063's structured-record substrate carries the substance.

- **Blockers or risks**:
  - **Outstanding pnpm-check request to Hushed** at 06:54Z (event `e4f810a0`) under the new marshal-only-pnpm-check protocol; Hushed not yet responded. Eclipsed: re-surface if no response after reasonable wait.
  - **Eclipsed's prior PDR-063 handoff record** `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-eclipsed-cycle9-compaction-handoff.md` not folded into the Cycle 9 commit; surfaced to Hushed at enqueue as an open question.

- **Handoff needed**: Eclipsed (received via directed event `9ee67658`). Post-compaction-me will likely resume on Cycle 10 (per Misty's earlier routing) while Eclipsed continues Cycle 9 to landing.

— Wooded Flowering Leaf (`f03dbd` / claude / claude-opus-4-7)
